tagliatelle-with-prosciutto-and-orange.name: Tagliatelle With Prosciutto And Orange
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Season with salt; add pasta and cook, stirring occasionally, until 1 minute before al dente, about 2 minutes for fresh pasta, longer for dried. Drain, reserving 1/4 cup pasta water.
Meanwhile, melt butter in a large heavy nonstick skillet over medium-high heat. Add prosciutto; sauté until browned, about 3 minutes.

Add reserved pasta water, orange juice, half of zest, and cream; bring to a boil. Add pasta; cook, stirring, until sauce coats pasta and pasta is al dente, about 1 minute. Season with salt and pepper. Stir in cheese and divide among warm bowls. Sprinkle remaining orange zest over pasta.

tagliatelle-with-zucchini-flowers-and-ch.name: Tagliatelle With Zucchini Flowers And Cherry Tomatoes

ingredients.prep: zucchini and blossoms separated and both halved lengthwise

ingredients.item: -ounce containers cherry tomatoes or grape tomatoes

instructions: Place 2 1/2 cups semolina flour in large bowl; make well in center. Add eggs, 1 tablespoon water, oil, and salt to well. Using fork, beat egg mixture to blend and stir flour into egg mixture, forming rough dough.
Sprinkle work surface with all purpose flour. Turn dough out onto floured surface; knead until smooth, 5 minutes. Cover dough with plastic wrap and let rest 30 minutes.

Divide dough into 4 pieces. Set pasta machine to widest setting. Working with 1 piece of dough and covering remaining dough to prevent drying, run dough through machine 6 times. Cut dough strip in half crosswise. Turn machine to next narrower setting. Continue to run dough strips through machine, adjusting to next narrower setting after every 6 passes, until each strip is about 24 inches long and 1/16 inch thick. Arrange strips on parchment paper.
Repeat with remaining 3 dough pieces. Let dough strips rest at room temperature until beginning to dry, 20 to 30 minutes.

Fit pasta machine with 1/4- to 1/3-inch-wide cutting attachment. Run dough strips through machine, cutting into tagliatelle. Mound pasta on sheets of parchment. Sprinkle with all purpose flour and toss to coat. DO AHEAD Let stand at room temperature up to 3 hours, tossing occasionally, or cover and chill overnight.

Heat oil in large deep skillet over medium-high heat. Add garlic and sauté until golden but not brown, about 1 minute. Add zucchini halves and tomatoes. Sprinkle with salt and pepper. Sauté until zucchini is tender, about 5 minutes. Add zucchini blossoms; toss until tender, 1 to 2 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook pasta in large pot of boiling salted water until just tender, about 3 minutes. Drain, reserving 2 cups pasta cooking liquid. Return pasta to same pot.
Add vegetable mixture, basil, and pine nuts to pasta. Toss over medium heat until heated, adding pasta cooking liquid by 1/4 cupfuls if dry. Season with salt and pepper.
Divide pasta among 6 shallow bowls. Serve, passing cheese separately.

takeout-style-shrimp-pork-egg-rolls.name: Takeout-style Shrimp & Pork Egg Rolls
instructions: Place the glass noodles in a large bowl and add enough hot water to cover. Let sit for 10 minutes, until softened. Drain the noodles and chop into ½-inch (1-cm) pieces.
In a large bowl, mix together the chopped glass noodles, cabbage, carrots, scallions, onion powder, garlic powder, salt, pepper, soy sauce, and sesame oil. Toss until well combined.
Then, fold in the chopped shrimp and ground pork until just incorporated.

Place a spring roll wrapper on a clean work surface and add 3 tablespoons of filling to the center. Fold the bottom of the wrapper over the filling, then fold in the sides and roll. Lightly wet the exposed with your fingertip and continue rolling to seal the egg roll. Repeat with the remaining wrappers and filling.

Fill a deep skillet with ½ inch (1 cm) of vegetable oil and heat over medium-high heat until the oil reaches 325˚F (160˚C). Fry the egg rolls in batches of 1-2 at a time for 2½- 3 minutes on each side, until crispy and golden brown. Remove from oil and drain on a wire rack or plate lined with paper towels to absorb any extra oil.
Enjoy!

takoyaki.name: Takoyaki
instructions: Make the batter: In a medium bowl, whisk together the egg, water, dashi stock powder, and flour until well incorporated. Transfer the batter to a squeeze bottle or spouted measuring cup for easy pouring.

Preheat the takoyaki plate over medium heat for 2 minutes. Grease the holes with 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil. Fill each hole halfway with the batter. Place a piece of octopus in the center of each hole, then top with green onions, ginger, and tempura flakes. Cover with more batter (it’s okay if it overflows a bit) and cook for 2 minutes, until starting to turn golden brown. Use 2 takoyaki turners or chopsticks to turn the takoyaki ¾ of the way and cook for 2 minutes more, until the other side is starting to turn golden brown. Continue rotating and cooking the takoyaki until evenly golden brown on all sides. Drizzle the remaining tablespoon of vegetable oil over the takoyaki, flip over completely, and cook for 1 minute more on each side, until crispy and golden brown.
Transfer the takoyaki to a plate and drizzle with takoyaki sauce and Japanese mayonnaise, then sprinkle with aonori and katsuobushi.
Enjoy!

tamarind-date-agua-fresca.name: Tamarind & Date Agua Fresca
instructions: Combine tamarind, dates, and 2 1/2 quarts water in a medium pot and bring to a boil; simmer briskly, stirring often and mashing pulp and dates with the back of a spoon until they break down, about 15 minutes. Remove from heat and let steep for 2 hours.
Strain mixture through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl, pressing on solids to extract as much liquid as possible (you should have about 4 cups).
Transfer tamarind mixture to a pitcher. Stir in sugar and 3 cups water. Chill until cold.
Fill glasses with ice. Divide agua fresca among glasses.

tamarind-sherbet-lezzet.name: Tamarind Sherbet

ingredients.item: 500 g ironhindi (wasted and soaked in water for 1 night)

instructions: 1. Add water to the pot and boil.
2. When it begins to boil well, add cloves, chakule, ginger, rod cinnamon and lemon and boil for 5 minutes.
3. Leave the mixture from the stove when he found each other.
4. Add thought honey to 70 degrees and leave rest for 8 hours.
5. Cold service by adding ice.

tangerine-sweet-of-the-spoon-argiro.name: Tangerine Sweet Of The Spoon
instructions: We wash the tangerines well.
Remove the stem.
With the tip of the knife remove a piece of skin in the cot compound.
We warm them for 3 times from 2 minutes.
We let them drain into a colander.
Draw one at a time to remove the many liquids and leave them upside down with the cut point touching a towel clean for 5-6 hours.
[adrotate banner=”72′′]
Boil the sugar and water for 5-6′′ and add the tangerines.
Allow to boil for 5′.
Turn off the heat, cover with a clean towel and let them cool in their syrup.
We take them out with a drill spoon.
We tie the syrup to form a knot and we reshoot the tangerines.
Boil for 5-6′′ and add lemon juice to the end of the boil.
Allow it to cool and place it in a sterile jar.

tarragon-creamed-corn.name: Tarragon Creamed Corn

ingredients.item: Tarragon plus chopped leaves for serving
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Cut corn kernels from cobs and set aside. Using the back of a knife and working over a large dish, scrape each cob to extract as much milk as possible. Bring corn milk, cobs, tarragon sprigs, cream, and 4 cups water to a boil in a large saucepan. Remove from heat and let sit 10 minutes.

Strain cream mixture into another large saucepan; discard solids. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until reduced by half, 20–25 minutes. Add reserved corn kernels and simmer until soft, 5–10 minutes; season with salt and pepper.
Transfer ⅓ of corn mixture to a blender; add Parmesan and purée until smooth. Stir purée back into corn mixture.
Serve creamed corn sprinkled with chopped tarragon.

tarts-with-chocolate-ganache-and-strawbe.name: Tarts With Chocolate Ganache And Strawberries
tarts-with-chocolate-ganache-and-strawbe.original_name: Τάρτες με γκανάζ σοκολάτας και φράουλες
instructions: Prepare the tart according to the basic dough for sweet and salty tarts or according to the basic recipe dough for sweet tart.
Open the dough in a thin foil of 0.5 cm thick and cut 6 discs for individual tarts.
We're buttering the tartaries.
Spread every dough tray on an individual tart. Lay the edges, pierce the surface and freeze.
Bake the tart according to the recipe instructions.
After the tarts are cooked, divide the jam, spread it to the tarts and continue baking for 3 minutes.
Let them cool.
Finely chop the chocolate in a bowl, add the butter and salt.
Place the cream in a pot and let it come to a boiling point.
Pour the chocolate with the cream.
Leave 1 minute and then mix with spatula until the mixture is polished and slightly thickened.
Allow the liquid chocolate to cool.
We equalize chocolate on tarts.
Place them in the refrigerator and leave them for at least 2 hours until the cream is frozen and stabilised.
Garnish the tarts with fresh strawberries and sprinkle with some icing.

tempura-bowl.name: Tempura Bowl
instructions: Prepare shrimp by taking off shell and deveining.
Make 4 slits down the stomach. Flip shrimp on the side and diagonally slice 4 more slits on each side. (This will keep the shrimp straight when cooked.)
In a medium bowl, beat egg and soda water.
Heat a pot of oil to 350˚F (180˚C).
Then add cake flour and mix, but keep it clumpy. Do NOT over-mix.
Dredge shrimp up to the tail and carefully place into frying oil. Fry for 2-3 minutes or until shrimp is fully cooked. Place tempura on paper towel to absorb oil or a wired rack to drain excess oil.
For the dipping sauce, combine soy sauce and mirin. If using, dissolve dashi in the hot water and add to the soy sauce and mirin.
Arrange assorted tempura on a bowl of rice.
Nutrition  Calories: 2792 Fat: 253 grams  Carbs: 128 grams Fiber: 15 grams  Sugars: 19 grams  Protein: 17 grams
Enjoy!

tender-dough-pastries-with-minced-meat-t.name: Tender Dough Pastries With Minced Meat
tender-dough-pastries-with-minced-meat-t.original_name: Pastéis de massa tenra com carne picada

ingredients.item: 350 g de carne de vaca picada

instructions: Prepare the dough: peel the flour into a bowl, mix some salt and add warm water, stirring always. Add the butter and lard at room temperature, knead well, then form a ball and book.

Prepare o recheio: refogue a cebola e os alhos, previamente descascados e picados, num tacho com o azeite, o louro e o ramo de tomilho. Acrescente a carne picada, mexa, depois junte a polpa de tomate, tempere com sal, pimenta e a salsa picada e mexa novamente. Retire do lume, junte um pouco de molho bechamel e envolva.

Finely extend the dough with a roll, on a floury surface, distribute small portions of the filling through it, cover with the part of the dough without filling and press around it with your fingers. Cut with a rectangular cutter and join well the ends.
Fry the pastels in warm and abundant oil on both sides until they are golden, then remove them with a skimmer and put them on absorbent paper. Serve hot or cold.

teriyaki-salmon-and-kale-sheet-pan-suppe.name: Teriyaki Salmon And Kale Sheet Pan Supper
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C. Strip the stems and center ribs out of the kale leaves and place the leaves on a baking sheet. Discard the ribs and stems. Tear the leaves into smaller chunks.
Drizzle the kale with olive oil and toss, making sure the oil lightly coats all the pieces.

Nestle the salmon among the kale leaves, skin side down (if your fillets have skin) and sprinkle them with salt and pepper. Drizzle a couple of teaspoons of teriyaki sauce over each fillet and brush it to lightly coat the surface.
Bake for about 10 minutes, shaking the pan once to make sure the kale doesn’t burn. (It should brown a little around the edges.)
Warm the remaining teriyaki sauce in the microwave for about 15 seconds and pour it over each piece of salmon, letting it sit for a couple of minutes before serving. (I can’t even wait for a plate!)

thai-sweet-potato-soup.name: Thai Sweet Potato Soup

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat. Add onion and sauté until soft and translucent, 3 to 4 minutes. Add curry paste, Sriracha sauce, ginger, and garlic; sauté until fragrant, 3 to 4 minutes. Stir in sweet potatoes and carrots; season with kosher salt and pepper.

Add vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Reduce the heat to low and simmer until vegetables are fork tender, 20 to 25 minutes. Turn off the heat and purée with an immersion blender until soup is smooth. Stir in coconut milk and adjust seasoning, if necessary.

the-buffalo-wing-sauce.name: The Buffalo Wing Sauce
instructions: Combine hot sauce, butter, vinegar, and sugar in a saucepan; bring to a slow boil and cook until smooth, about 5 minutes.

the-most-awesome-dip-alive.name: The Most Awesome Dip Alive

ingredients.item: Diced tomatoes with green chile peppers

instructions: Place sausage in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir until no longer pink, about 8 minutes. Drain excess grease from the skillet.
Combine diced tomatoes and cream cheese in a saucepan over medium-low heat; cook and stir until cream cheese is melted and smooth, about 5 minutes. Mix in sausage. Transfer to a serving bowl.

tibok-tibok.name: Tibok-tibok
instructions: Whisk coconut milk, cocoa powder, sugar, cornstarch, and salt in a medium heatproof bowl. Add chocolate and set bowl over a large saucepan of simmering water (make sure bottom of bowl is not touching the water). Cook, stirring and scraping bottom of bowl often, until mixture is thickened to a pudding-like consistency, 10–12 minutes (it will thicken further as it cools). Remove bowl from pan and divide tibok-tibok among glasses. Chill until cold, at least 1 hour.

Top with coconut just before serving.
Do ahead: Tibok-tibok (without coconut) can be made 3 days ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

tiramisu-with-amaretti-cookies.name: Tiramisù With Amaretti Cookies
instructions: Whisk egg yolks in a medium bowl to blend, then gradually add sugar, whisking constantly until mixture is thick, smooth, and pale yellow. Using a rubber spatula, gently fold in mascarpone, rum, and salt; set aside.

Place espresso in a small bowl. Working in batches, gently mix and turn cookies in espresso 20 seconds to soak. Divide cookies among glasses and top each with ½ cup mascarpone mixture. Chill at least 1 hour.
Dust tiramisù with cocoa powder just before serving.
Do Ahead: Tiramisù can be made 1 day ahead. Cover and keep chilled.

to-make-apple-sandwich.name: To-make Apple Sandwich
instructions: Spread peanut butter over one side of one apple slice; top with granola. Place remaining apple slice atop the granola to finish the sandwich.

toast-with-ramp-kimchi-and-poached-eggs.name: Toast With Ramp Kimchi And Poached Eggs

ingredients.item: Gochugaru (coarse korean hot pepper powder) or 1 teaspoon mild chile flakes

instructions: Cut ramp bulbs in half (quarter if large). Slice greens into 1" pieces. Give ramp bulbs and greens, salt, and sugar a good toss in a medium bowl. Let sit until greens are slightly softened and begin to release a little liquid, about 1 hour. Mix gochugaru, fish sauce, and ginger into kimchi.
Spread kimchi over toast and top each with a poached egg.
Do Ahead: Ramp kimchi can be made 2 weeks ahead. Cover and chill. Kimchi will mellow slightly over time.

toasted-barley-risotto-with-spinach-and-.name: Toasted Barley Risotto With Spinach And Herb Purée

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Finely grated meyer lemon or regular lemon zest
Meyer lemon or regular lemon juice

instructions: Preheat oven to 350°. Toast barley on a rimmed baking sheet until light golden brown and fragrant, 8–10 minutes. Set aside.
Bring broth to a boil in large saucepan; reduce heat to low and keep broth warm.
Heat 1 Tbsp. butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion, season with salt and pepper, and cook, stirring often, until softened and translucent, about 5 minutes.

Add barley, thyme, bay leaf, and 2 cups warm broth to skillet and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring often, until broth is almost absorbed, about 5 minutes. Add remaining broth by ½-cupfuls, allowing it to be absorbed before adding more and stirring often, until barley is tender and mixture is creamy, 40–50 minutes (you may not use all the broth). Remove bay leaf.

Meanwhile, cook spinach and parsley in a large pot of boiling salted water until leaves are bright green and just wilted, about 5 seconds. Drain; transfer to a bowl of ice water and let cool. Drain and squeeze well to remove excess water.
Coarsely chop spinach and parsley, then purée with oil and a splash of water in a blender, adding more water as needed, until smooth. Set spinach purée aside.
Mix garlic, lemon zest, and lemon juice into barley mixture, then mix in Parmesan ¼-cupful at a time, stirring until melted and well combined before adding more. Mix in remaining 2 Tbsp. butter.
Remove barley risotto from heat and mix in spinach purée and herbs; season with salt and pepper.

tomato-and-basil-risotto-recipe-comedera.name: Tomato And Basil Risotto Recipe
tomato-and-basil-risotto-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de risotto de tomate y albahaca

ingredients.item: 2 cdas de aceite de oliva  (virgen extra )

instructions: Keep your vegetable stock hot in a saucer with low heat.
In a large saucer, heats olive oil with medium heat. Add onion and garlic, cooking till tender and translucent.
Add the Arborio rice and remove for 2-3 minutes to impregnate from oil and become slightly translucent at edges.
Fold the white wine and cook, stirring constantly, till the liquid has evaporate.

Add a tablespoon of hot stock to the rice and gently remove until absorbed. Repeat this process by adding the stock little by little, for about 18-20 minutes, till the rice is creamy but still to the dente.
Mid-cooking of the rice incorporates minced tomatoes and continues to add broth until the rice is cooked.
Once the rice's ready, remove the pan from the fire. Add butter, parmesan cheese, and basil, gently stirring to integrate all flavors. Fits with salt and pepper to taste.
Deja reposar el risotto durante un par de minutos antes de servir para que los sabores se asienten.

tomato-and-cheddar-omelette-lezzet.name: Tomato And Cheddar Omelette
instructions: 1. Home
2. In a bowl of eggs &ldil; rub.
3.  Tuz ve karabiberi ekleyin.
4. If you want a softer omlet, you can also add a sweet spoon milk.
5. Heat a pan in medium fire.
6. Add olive oil.
7. Then take the obstacles into the pan, and put it into the light gang.
8. Pour the eggs in the pan in the tomatoes.
9. Drop without mixing.
10. When the eggs start to pee from the edges, sprinkle the grated cheese on.
11. 11. After rubbish cheese, continue cooking by folding omleti.
12. Take the pizzan omleti tab and make hot service by spreading fresh chopped parsley.
13.  Afiyet olsun.

tomato-fried-rice.name: Tomato Fried Rice

ingredients.item: . cherry and/or grape tomatoes of any and all colors
Chilled cooked long-grain white or brown rice

instructions: Trim dark green tops from scallions and thinly slice; set aside. Thinly slice white and pale green parts; set aside separately. Quarter any larger tomatoes and halve any small ones. Place about one-quarter of tomatoes in a small bowl; season generously with salt and toss to combine. Set aside.

Heat 1 Tbsp. sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high. Add reserved white and pale green parts of scallions and remaining three-quarters of tomatoes and cook, stirring occasionally, until softened and any liquid from tomatoes has evaporated, about 4 minutes. Mix in garlic and ginger; cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add rice and stir to separate grains. Cook just to heat rice through, about 3 minutes.

Scoot vegetables and rice to 1 side of skillet, then pour half of remaining sesame oil into pan. Add eggs and cook, stirring often, until just set, about 1 minute. Mix into vegetables and rice, then drizzle in soy sauce and cook, stirring, just until well combined.

Transfer fried rice to a large bowl or platter. Drain salted tomatoes, drizzle with olive oil, and spoon over rice. Sprinkle with reserved scallion tops and red pepper flakes (if using) and drizzle with remaining sesame oil. Finely grate zest from lemon over.

tomato-vermicelli-soup-recipe-lezzet.name: Tomato Vermicelli Soup Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 min of salt (according to food taste)

instructions: 1. Heat the butter and liquid oil in the pot, add flour and light roast.
2. Add butter and sugar, 1–2 minutes roast.
3. Slowly add the water, note to be eaten for sumixed.
4. Add Arpa to the city and boil it in jealous fire for 10–12 minutes, cook until the city softens.
5. Add salt and pepper, enjoy.
6. Take hot service, you can sprinkle fresh thyme or reindeed eyebrows on the uniform on request.
7.  Afiyet olsun.

torta-di-mele-italian-apple-cake.name: Torta Di Mele (italian Apple Cake)
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a pie plate and dust with bread crumbs

Combine melted butter, 1/2 cup sugar, and vanilla bean seeds in a bowl. Add eggs and stir to combine. Mix flour, baking powder, and salt in a bowl and add to butter mixture. Add milk if batter is too thick
Pour batter into the prepared pie plate. Distribute apple slices in a thick layer on top of the batter. Dot with cubed butter and sprinkle with 1/4 cup sugar.

Bake in the preheated oven until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 30 to 45 minutes. Cool on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Run a table knife around the edges to loosen. Invert carefully onto a serving plate or cooling rack. Let cool completely.

tulum-cheese-pasta-recipe-lezzet.name: Tulum Cheese Pasta Recipe

ingredients.item: 1 tooth garlic (ezed or veccedil;ok thin chopped, optional)
Salt (to be adjusted according to water)

instructions: 1. Magicfill plenty of water to a pot, add salt and boil.
2. Add pasta when boiling water and cook until the remaining light.
3. Then before hungry take the water of salt up to glass.
4. Take butter and olive oil to a large pan.
5. Add the thin fits when fats are melted, and just hang the smell until long.
6. Dö directly to the oily pan;kün.
7. For a few melodys.
8. Add the boiled water to the pan.
9. Then mix the pasta with s&uuml, adding the grated bag cheese to the ground.
10. Cheese will consist of a natural saucepan.
11. 11. 11. 11. Karabiber and optionallypap pepper.
12. Add some more cake juice if it comes dark; very few in jealous fire; minutes more turn.
12. August Take cake to plates, u sprinkle the cheese with extra bags.
14 July If you like a panco or bread crumb in a pan, you can add a lightly roast and cake u sprinkle on the car & add a touch to the type.

turkey-gratin-teleculinaria.name: Turkey Gratin
instructions: Descasque a cebola e os dentes de alho e pique-os finamente. Leve ao lume um tacho com o azeite, junte a cebola e os alhos e deixe refogar ligeiramente.
In a separate pot, it cooks the dough in salted water for about 10 minutes. Drain and reserve.
Add the tomato to the saute, as well as the turkey leftovers, cut into pieces, salt, pepper, chopped parsley and bechamel. Add the dough and wrap everything.
Have the previous mixture on a tray, sprinkle with the cheese and put it in the oven, preheated at 180oC, until gratin (the top should be golden). Serve hot.

turkey-leg-in-the-oven-teleculinaria.name: Turkey Leg In The Oven
instructions: Remove excess fat from the turkey leg, give it three deep blows and put it on a tray or pyrex.
In a bowl, put the peeled and crushed garlic, orange juice, white wine, laurel leaves, mustard, pepper, salt and pepper. Wrap and season the turkey leg with this mixture, spreading well.

Take it to the fridge and let it rest for about 3 hours to gain flavor. After this time, bring the meat to the preheated oven at 175oC for about 1 hour and 15 minutes. Serve with accompaniment to taste.

turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-plum-and-drie.name: Turkey Recipe Stuffed With Plum And Dried Apricots
turkey-recipe-stuffed-with-plum-and-drie.original_name: Receta de pavo relleno de ciruela y orejones
instructions: Pela los dientes de ajo y tritura.
En un bol, incorpora el aceite de oliva, los dientes de ajo, el tomillo, el perejil, la pimienta y la sal. Mezcla muy bien.
Unta el pavo con el marinado hasta que quede bien impregnado. Coloca en un un envase y envuelve. Deja marinar por una hora.
Do some cuts to his turkey, tipting him.
After that time, preheat the oven at 200 ° C
Remove the stem to the apples and cut into cubes. He also cuts his onion.
Warm up a frying pan with some olive oil. Fry the onions for a few minutes. It incorporates raisins and ears and apples.
Sazona con sal y pimienta, mezcla y cocina por 4 minutos. Apaga.
Rellena el pavo con el salteado y ata las patas del pavo.
Put the turkey on a plate and bathe with the white wine. Incorporates lemon juice and bay leaves.
Bake the turkey for 30 minutes at 200 ° C after that time, lower the oven's intensity at 170 ° C and continue to bake for 2 hours till juicy and doradito.
Apaga el horno, deja reposar el pavo y sirve.

turkey-steaks-with-mushrooms-and-coffee-.name: Turkey Steaks With Mushrooms And Coffee
turkey-steaks-with-mushrooms-and-coffee-.original_name: Bifes de peru com cogumelos e café
instructions: Tempere os bifes com sal e pimenta. Lave os cogumelos, escorra-os bem, lamine-os e reserve-os.
Fry the steaks in a frying pan with the olive oil until golden on both sides. Remove from the skillet and reserve.
In the same frying pan, put the mushrooms down and let them saute, stirring. Add chopped garlic, water with white wine and wrap. Let it boil for alcohol to evaporate.
Then add cream and coffee and stir well. Let it boil again until you get a creamy sauce. Add the fried steaks, wrap, sprinkle with chopped parsley and serve with boiled white rice.

turkey-steaks-with-mustard-sauce-telecul.name: Turkey Steaks With Mustard Sauce
turkey-steaks-with-mustard-sauce-telecul.original_name: Bifinhos de peru com molho de mostarda
instructions: Season the steaks with salt and pepper. Take a frying pan to the fire, with a thread of olive oil, let it heat up and fry the steaks on both sides for 8 minutes or until they are cooked.
Add garlic, previously peeled and laminated, mustards and refresh with white wine. Add the creams, wrap and cook until you get a velvety texture. Remove and reserve.
Peel and cut the oranges into buds, wash and cut the tomatoes in half and place them in a bowl. Add coriander leaves and wrap.
Disponha os bifes num prato com o molho, polvilhe com cebolinho picado, acompanhe com a salada de laranja e tomate e sirva.

turkish-eggs-with-yogurt-cilbir-pequerec.name: Turkish Eggs with Yogurt (çilbar)

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon of sweet or hot peppermint

instructions: En un bol, mezcla el yogur con los dientes de ajo picados y una pizca de sal. Deja reposar a temperatura ambiente.

Fill a saucer with water and add vinegar. It leads to boiling and then reduces to low heat. Break the eggs one by one in a small bowl and carefully slide them into water. Cooking for 3-4 minutes to get steamed eggs with liquid yolks. Retire with a frying and place them on absorbing paper.
In a small frying pan, melt butter with medium heat. Add the pimenton and cook till the butter takes an intense red and has a fragrant smell about 1-2 minutes.
Divide the yogurt with garlic between the serving plates. Put two tipped eggs above each portion of yogurt. Roy with hot peppermint butter and decorates with fresh sprouts if you wish

turmeric-artichoke-lezzet.name: Turmeric Artichoke
instructions: 1. Drink tears from one day to 5 minutes in boiling water, waiting in water.
2. Broadcast the chopped onions on the bottom of a large pot.
3. On the other hand, respectively, the tears are very thin sliced (you can peel with the fungus peeler) then sprinkle the uncleed shutters.
4. Add lemon juice on artichokes.
5. After mixing in a small container with olive oil, salt, sugar and crispy, add this mixture into the pot.
6. Add hot water.
7. Close the cover of the pot.
8. Bake until the mostgins were softened in the chopped fire.
9. Serve hot.
